title: ajuga campylanthoides
intro: Ajuga campylanthoides, also known as Himalayan bugle, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Ajuga campylanthoides is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
